zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Warburton於1459年1月10日出生在英國爾阿爾 霍爾時，他的父親Piers Warburton36歲，母親Elizabeth Mainwaring36歲。他於1489年2月10日與Lady Jane Stanley Warburton在威爾士丹比爾霍爾特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1495年被列為sheriff of cheshire。他去世於1524年在英國英格蘭爾阿爾享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Warburton于1459年1月10日出生在英国爾阿爾 霍爾时，他的父亲Piers Warburton36岁，母亲Elizabeth Mainwaring36岁。他于1489年2月10日与Lady Jane Stanley Warburton在威尔士丹比爾霍爾特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1495年被列为sheriff of cheshire。他去世于1524年在英国英格兰爾阿爾享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Warburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire) called Warburton, from the Old English female personal name Wǣrburg (composed of the elements wǣr ‘pledge’ + burh ‘fortress’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warbritton
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Warburton  . This form of the surname is not found in English sources.

variants.name: Warbington
meanings: English (Lancashire): perhaps a variant of   Warburton  ; otherwise a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Warburton was born on 10 January 1459, in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, his father, Piers Warburton, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth Mainwaring, was 36. He married Lady Jane Stanley Warburton on 10 February 1489, in Holt, Denbighshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. In 1495, his occupation is listed as sheriff of cheshire. He died in 1524, in Arley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Warburton est né le 10 janvier 1459, à Arley Hall, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Piers Warburton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mainwaring, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jane Stanley Warburton le 10 février 1489, à Holt, Denbighshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. En 1495, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of cheshire. Il est décédé en 1524, à Arley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Warburton am 10. Januar 1459 in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Piers Warburton 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Mainwaring 36. Er hat am 10. Februar 1489 in Holt, Denbighshire, Wales Lady Jane Stanley Warburton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1495 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of cheshire aufgeführt. Er starb 1524 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Arley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Warburton è nato il il 10 gennaio 1459 nel Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Piers Warburton, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Mainwaring, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Lady Jane Stanley Warburton il 10 febbraio 1489, nel Holt, Denbighshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Nel 1495, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of cheshire. Morì nel 1524, nel Arley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Warburtonが1459年1月10日にイギリスチェシュアイアアルリー ハルで生まれた時，父Piers Warburtonは36歳，母Elizabeth Mainwaringは36歳であった。1489年2月10日にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアホルトでLady Jane Stanley Warburtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。1495年，職業はsheriff of cheshireと記録されている。彼は1524年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルリーで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Warburton(이)가 1459년 1월 10일 영국 체실르 알리 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Piers Warburton(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mainwaring(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1489년 2월 10일 웨일스 덴비그h실르 홀트에서 Lady Jane Stanley Warburton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1495년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of cheshire이었다. 그는 1524년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알리에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Warburton nasceu em 10 de janeiro de 1459, em Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Piers Warburton, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mainwaring, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Jane Stanley Warburton em 10 de fevereiro de 1489, em Holt, Denbighshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Em 1495, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of cheshire. Ele faleceu em 1524, em Arley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Warburton родился 10 января 1459 г. в местности арли холл, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Piers Warburton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mainwaring, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jane Stanley Warburton 10 февраля 1489 г. в местности холт, денбаишир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1495 году он работал по профессии sheriff of cheshire. Он умер в 1524 г. в местности арли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Warburton nació el 10 de enero de 1459, en Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Piers Warburton, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mainwaring, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Lady Jane Stanley Warburton el 10 de febrero de 1489, en Holt, Denbighshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. En 1495, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of cheshire. Murió en 1524, en Arley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
